DAVIDEMELU
GIS Analyst

GIS Analyst at Camber & Core Systems Inc. (formerly Pacific Tech Systems), specializing in geospatial data assessment, transformation, and quality assurance for NG9-1-1 and municipal datasets. Profiles and remediates Site/Structure Address Points and Road Centerlines against NENA and NG9-1-1 specifications, runs ETL and automated QA/QC, and resolves schema, attribution, and topology issues. Coordinates boundary alignment with adjacent jurisdictions and prepares the documentation that helps client staff sustain compliance in-house.

Competencies
  • Geospatial Data Assessment & Profiling
  • ETL & Data Transformation
  • Automated QA/QC & Validation
  • NENA / NG9-1-1 Standards Compliance
  • Schema, Attribution & Topology Remediation
  • Boundary Alignment & Coordination
  • Documentation & Knowledge Transfer

CAMBER & CORE
S Y S T E M S
Camber & Core Systems Inc. (formerly Pacific Tech Systems)

Relevant Project Experience

LiDAR Data Processing & DEM Generation

District of North Saanich · Camber & Core Systems Inc.

Processed raw, government-sourced LiDAR data (QA for completeness and resolution, noise filtering, and ground / non-ground classification) to generate a high-resolution Digital Elevation Model (DEM), validated against control points and reference datasets.

Outcome: Validated, high-accuracy DEM underpinning terrain analysis, infrastructure planning, and environmental management.

Steep Slope Map Production

District of North Saanich · Camber & Core Systems Inc.

Computed slope gradients from the DEM with advanced GIS algorithms, classifying terrain (moderate / steep / very steep) to flag areas of concern and produce steep slope maps to high cartographic standards.

Outcome: Print-ready maps in PDF, GeoTIFF, and Shapefile for land-use planning, development risk assessment, and slope-hazard safety.

NG9-1-1 Addressing Data Aggregation & Automation System (SSAP / NENA-Aligned)

Columbia Shuswap Regional District (CSRD) · Camber & Core Systems Inc.

Automated, end-to-end addressing aggregation centralizing multi-jurisdictional address points and road centerlines into a standardized, NENA-aligned SSAP environment, with a controlled DEFAULT / QA / municipality-editor versioning model and integration into CSRD's existing GIS.

Outcome: Authoritative SSAP dataset with automated QA/QC and audit logging; File Geodatabase deliverables ready for NG9-1-1 submission.

NENA-STA-006.2-2022 · CRTC NG9-1-1 · Provincial DRA alignment

NG9-1-1 Readiness & Addressing Operations Modernization (NENA-Aligned SSAP + Web App)

District of North Saanich · Camber & Core Systems Inc.

Standardized core GIS layers (address points, road centerlines, and emergency-response attributes) into a NENA-aligned SSAP dataset via conformance rules, schema alignment, and validation, plus a web app automating day-to-day addressing operations.

Outcome: Emergency-communications-ready data, automated QA/QC reporting, and a web-based intake / update workflow with submission-ready deliverables.

Project Engineering

Island Technical Installations · Victoria, BC
  • Built and maintained Excel project trackers (procurement, RFI, cost reporting), lifting data visibility and decision speed for project managers by 30%.
  • Consolidated financial and schedule data from sales and accounting into 5+ post-IFR cost reports for project-health assessment.

Transformer Analysis & Risk Assessment

Canfor (Northwood Pulp Mill) · Prince George, BC
  • Audited 10+ transformer systems and dissolved-gas-analysis oil reports, flagging 5+ at-risk units and averting ~CAD $400K in potential downtime.
  • Produced and presented risk-assessment reports and marked up the mill's Single Line Diagrams with DGA context for non-technical staff.

Terrace Transit Ridership Analysis

City of Terrace / BC Transit
  • Processed BC Transit ridership data in Excel and benchmarked it against Service Standard & Performance Guidelines targets.
